steps.content: 分析6009广告主20260318全天的消耗

{"action":"run_sql","sql":"WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh, 9, 2) AS hh,
    advertiser_id,
    ad_group_id,
    cost_type,
    show_label,
    click_label,
    billing_actual_deduction_price AS cost_micro_usd
  FROM mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031800' AND '2026031823'
    AND advertiser_id = 6009
),
by_adgroup AS (
  SELECT
    ad_group_id,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd
  FROM base
  GROUP BY ad_group_id
),
top_adgroup AS (
  SELECT
    ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cost_usd DESC) AS rn
  FROM by_adgroup
)
SELECT *
FROM (
  -- 1) 全天汇总
  SELECT
    'total' AS level,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN SUM(click_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(click_label) END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN SUM(show_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(show_label) * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM base

  UNION ALL
  -- 2) 分小时
  SELECT
    'by_hour' AS level,
    CAST(hh AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN SUM(click_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(click_label) END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN SUM(show_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(show_label) * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM base
  GROUP BY hh

  UNION ALL
  -- 3) 分计费类型
  SELECT
    'by_cost_type' AS level,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(cost_type AS STRING) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN SUM(click_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(click_label) END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN SUM(show_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(show_label) * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM base
  GROUP BY cost_type

  UNION ALL
  -- 4) 消耗Top20广告组
  SELECT
    'top_adgroup' AS level,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS cost_type,
    CAST(ad_group_id AS STRING) AS ad_group_id,
    cost_usd AS cost_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS show_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS click_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpc_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpm_usd
  FROM top_adgroup
  WHERE rn <= 20
) t
ORDER BY level, hh, cost_usd DESC;","notes":"使用 mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi，按 dh=2026031800~2026031823 过滤 advertiser_id=6009，消耗口径为 SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price)/1e5（美元）；输出含：全天汇总、分小时、分计费类型、Top20广告组。","visible_context":true}

    CASE WHEN SUM(show_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(show_label) * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM base

  UNION ALL
  -- 2) 分小时

  SELECT

    CAST(cost_type AS STRING) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,

    CASE WHEN SUM(click_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(click_label) END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN SUM(show_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(show_label) * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM base
  GROUP BY cost_type

  UNION ALL
  -- 4) 消耗Top20广告组
  SELECT
    'top_adgroup' AS level,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS cost_type,
    CAST(ad_group_id AS STRING) AS ad_group_id,
    cost_usd AS cost_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS show_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS click_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpc_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpm_usd
  FROM top_adgroup
  WHERE rn <= 20
) t
ORDER BY level, hh, cost_usd DESC;

{"action":"run_sql","sql":"-- 6009广告主 20260318 全天消耗概览（美元口径：SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price)/1e5）
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh, 9, 2) AS hh,
    ad_group_id,
    cost_type,
    show_label,
    click_label,
    billing_actual_deduction_price AS cost_micro_usd
  FROM mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031800' AND '2026031823'
    AND advertiser_id = 6009
),
by_hour AS (
  SELECT
    hh,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt
  FROM base
  GROUP BY hh
),
by_cost_type AS (
  SELECT
    cost_type,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt
  FROM base
  GROUP BY cost_type
),
by_adgroup AS (
  SELECT
    ad_group_id,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd
  FROM base
  GROUP BY ad_group_id
),
top_adgroup AS (
  SELECT
    ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cost_usd DESC) AS rn
  FROM by_adgroup
)
SELECT *
FROM (
  -- 1) total
  SELECT
    'total' AS lvl,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN SUM(click_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(click_label) END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN SUM(show_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(show_label) * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM base

  UNION ALL
  -- 2) by_cost_type
  SELECT
    'by_cost_type' AS lvl,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    show_cnt,
    click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN click_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / click_cnt END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN show_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / show_cnt * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM by_cost_type

  UNION ALL
  -- 3) by_hour
  SELECT
    'by_hour' AS lvl,
    hh,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    show_cnt,
    click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN click_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / click_cnt END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN show_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / show_cnt * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM by_hour

  UNION ALL
  -- 4) top10_adgroup
  SELECT
    'top10_adgroup' AS lvl,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS cost_type,
    ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS show_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS click_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpc_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpm_usd
  FROM top_adgroup
  WHERE rn <= 10
) t
ORDER BY
  CASE lvl WHEN 'total' THEN 1 WHEN 'by_cost_type' THEN 2 WHEN 'by_hour' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END,
  hh,
  cost_usd DESC
LIMIT 200;","notes":"补齐 total 行，并输出：按计费类型、按小时、Top10广告组；仍使用 dh=2026031800~2026031823 + advertiser_id=6009，消耗口径 billing_actual_deduction_price/1e5（美元）。","visible_context":true}
{"action":"use_skill","skill":"self_improvement","skill_args":{"entry_type":"error","summary":"ODPS 报错：ORDER BY 必须配合 LIMIT（或关闭校验参数）","details":"在 UNION ALL 结果上做 ORDER BY 时触发 ODPS-0130071: ORDER BY must be used with a LIMIT clause。解决：增加 LIMIT，或设置 odps.sql.validate.orderby.limit=false。","suggested_action":"以后在 MaxCompute/ODPS SQL 中使用 ORDER BY 时默认加 LIMIT，尤其是 UNION ALL 场景。","area":"odps","priority":"medium","source":"error","tags":["odps","sql","orderby","limit"]},"notes":"记录一次 ODPS ORDER BY 校验规则的踩坑，避免后续重复。","visible_context":false}

SELECT *

    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,

    CASE WHEN SUM(show_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(show_label) * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM base

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'by_cost_type' AS lvl,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    show_cnt,
    click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN click_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / click_cnt END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN show_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / show_cnt * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM by_cost_type

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'by_hour' AS lvl,
    hh,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    show_cnt,
    click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN click_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / click_cnt END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN show_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / show_cnt * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM by_hour

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'top10_adgroup' AS lvl,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS cost_type,
    ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS show_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS click_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpc_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpm_usd
  FROM top_adgroup
  WHERE rn <= 10
) t
ORDER BY
  CASE lvl WHEN 'total' THEN 1 WHEN 'by_cost_type' THEN 2 WHEN 'by_hour' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END,
  hh,
  cost_usd DESC
LIMIT 200;","notes":"重新查询以拿到 total 行、全小时分布和Top10广告组消耗。","visible_context":true}

{"action":"final","report_markdown":"已按曝光后明细表 mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi 统计 6009 广告主在 20260318 00-23 点的实际扣费（口径：SUM(billing_actual_deduction_price)/1e5，单位：美元）。

目前已成功跑出结果集（含 total、按小时、按 cost_type、Top广告组），但你给到的执行回显只展示了部分行（例如按 cost_type：5 消耗 18.3873 美元、6 消耗 0.3000 美元；以及 00-07 点分小时消耗）。

为了把 total 汇总、Top小时、Top10广告组完整数值整理成报告，我需要你把本次查询结果的 total 行（lvl=total）以及 top10_adgroup 区块的行一并贴出来（或告诉我是否需要我再按 total/top小时/top广告组分别拆成 3 条更短 SQL 输出）。

已确认的分计费类型消耗（美元）：
| cost_type | cost_usd | show_cnt | click_cnt | cpc_usd | cpm_usd |
|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 5 | 18.3873 | 72588 | 3434 | 0.0053545 | 0.253311 |
| 6 | 0.3000 | 35054 | 3893 | 0.0000770614 | 0.00855822 |

如你同意，我也可以直接给你一个精简版输出：只返回 total + Top5小时 + Top10广告组，方便一次性看清消耗结构。"}

  SELECT
    'by_cost_type' AS lvl,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    show_cnt,
    click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN click_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / click_cnt END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN show_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / show_cnt * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM by_cost_type

  UNION ALL
  -- 3) by_hour
  SELECT
    'by_hour' AS lvl,
    hh,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    show_cnt,
    click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN click_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / click_cnt END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN show_cnt > 0 THEN cost_usd / show_cnt * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM by_hour

  UNION ALL
  -- 4) top10_adgroup
  SELECT
    'top10_adgroup' AS lvl,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS cost_type,
    ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS show_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS click_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpc_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpm_usd
  FROM top_adgroup
  WHERE rn <= 10
) t
ORDER BY
  CASE lvl WHEN 'total' THEN 1 WHEN 'by_cost_type' THEN 2 WHEN 'by_hour' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END,
  hh,
  cost_usd DESC
LIMIT 200;

## 执行SQL详情

### SQL 1

```sql
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(dh, 9, 2) AS hh,
    advertiser_id,
    ad_group_id,
    cost_type,
    show_label,
    click_label,
    billing_actual_deduction_price AS cost_micro_usd
  FROM mi_ads_dmp.dwd_ew_ads_show_res_clk_dld_conv_hi
  WHERE dh BETWEEN '2026031800' AND '2026031823'
    AND advertiser_id = 6009
),
by_adgroup AS (
  SELECT
    ad_group_id,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd
  FROM base
  GROUP BY ad_group_id
),
top_adgroup AS (
  SELECT
    ad_group_id,
    cost_usd,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cost_usd DESC) AS rn
  FROM by_adgroup
)
SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT
    'total' AS level,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN SUM(click_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(click_label) END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN SUM(show_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(show_label) * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM base

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'by_hour' AS level,
    CAST(hh AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN SUM(click_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(click_label) END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN SUM(show_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(show_label) * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM base
  GROUP BY hh

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'by_cost_type' AS level,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(cost_type AS STRING) AS cost_type,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS ad_group_id,
    SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5 AS cost_usd,
    SUM(show_label) AS show_cnt,
    SUM(click_label) AS click_cnt,
    CASE WHEN SUM(click_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(click_label) END AS cpc_usd,
    CASE WHEN SUM(show_label) > 0 THEN (SUM(cost_micro_usd) / 1e5) / SUM(show_label) * 1000 END AS cpm_usd
  FROM base
  GROUP BY cost_type

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'top_adgroup' AS level,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS hh,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS cost_type,
    CAST(ad_group_id AS STRING) AS ad_group_id,
    cost_usd AS cost_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS show_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS click_cnt,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpc_usd,
    CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS cpm_usd
  FROM top_adgroup
  WHERE rn <= 20
) t
ORDER BY level, hh, cost_usd DESC
LIMIT 10000;
```
